name: Stromboli
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, dissolve yeast and warm water. Mix in vegetable oil, flour (gradually; you may not need all 5 cups), and salt until combined.
2. Turn dough onto a floured surface and knead for about 10 minutes until smooth.
3. Place the dough in a greased bowl, turn once to grease it, cover with a towel, and let rise for 45 minutes.
4. Divide the dough into two halves. Roll one half into a rectangle measuring 15 inches by 12 inches.
5. Spread half of the rectangle with mustard. Layer six slices of shredded mozzarella cheese, sliced cooked ham, and six slices of browning ground beef on top of the mustard.
6. Fold the plain half of the dough over the filling, sealing the edges well using fork tongs.
7. Brush the rolled-out dough with oil and sprinkle with oregano.
8. Repeat steps 4-7 with the second half of the dough.
9. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
10. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until lightly browned.
11. Cool, then cut into 1-inch slices.
